zh.lifeSummary: 當Imagina von Isenburg Limburg於1255年出生時，她的父親Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I11252歲，母親Imagina von Blieskastel25歲。她和Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1313年9月29日享年58歲，埋葬在德國賀瑟威斯巴登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Imagina von Isenburg Limburg于1255年出生时，她的父亲Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I11252岁，母亲Imagina von Blieskastel25岁。她和Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1313年9月29日享年58岁，埋葬在德国賀瑟威斯巴登。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Isenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German or Jewish   Eisenberg  .
German: habitational name from the name of a medieval castle in the southern part of Hesse, the origin of a long line of nobility from the 12th century into the 21st century.

variants.name: Eisenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Moshe, Isadore, Akiva, Aron, Avner, Chaim, Emanuel, Isidor.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named, from Middle High German īsen ‘iron’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Limburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named, the largest being in Hesse.

Dutch (also Van Limburg): habitational name for someone from the province of Limburg or from several places so named, like Limburg in the Belgian province of Liège or from Limbourg in Haut-Rhin, France, all named with the ancient Germanic elements lindo ‘lime tree’ or ‘dragon’ + burg ‘fortified place’.

en.lifeSummary: When Imagina von Isenburg Limburg was born in 1255, her father, Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I, was 11252 and her mother, Imagina von Blieskastel, was 25. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans. She died on 29 September 1313, at the age of 58, and was buried in Wiesbaden, Hesse, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Imagina von Isenburg Limburg est née en 1255, son père, Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I, avait 11252 ans et sa mère, Imagina von Blieskastel, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans. Elle est décédée le 29 septembre 1313, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Wiesbaden, Hessen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Imagina von Isenburg Limburg 1255 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I 11252 und ihre Mutter Imagina von Blieskastel 25. Sie hatte mit Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. September 1313 im Alter von 58 Jahren und wurde in Wiesbaden, Hessen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Imagina von Isenburg Limburg è nata il nel 1255, sua padre, Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I, aveva 11252 anni e sua madre, Imagina von Blieskastel, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans. Morì il 29 settembre 1313, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Wiesbaden, Hessen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Imagina von Isenburg Limburgが1255年に生まれた時，父Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels Iは11252歳，母Imagina von Blieskastelは25歳であった。彼女はAdolf Count of Nassau King of the Romansとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1313年9月29日に58歳で死去し，ドイツヘセンウィエスバデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Imagina von Isenburg Limburg(이)가 1255년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I(은)는 11252세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Imagina von Blieskastel(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1313년 9월 29일 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 헤센 위스바든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Imagina von Isenburg Limburg nasceu em 1255, seu pai, Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I, tinha 11252 anos e sua mãe, Imagina von Blieskastel, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans. Ela faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1313, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Wiesbaden, Hessen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Imagina von Isenburg Limburg родилась в 1255 г., её отцу по имени Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I было 11252 года, а матери, которую звали Imagina von Blieskastel, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans. Она умерла 29 сентября 1313 г. в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности виесбаден, Гессен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Imagina von Isenburg Limburg nació en 1255, su papá, Gerlach Von Isenburg, Herr Zu Arenfels I, tenía 11252 años y su mamá, Imagina von Blieskastel, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1313, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Wiesbaden, Hessen, Alemania.
